mcp_tools.name: filesystem_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Local filesystem access for reading evidence packs, documentation plans, handoff payloads, and writing completed documents and build reports.

mcp_tools.name: template_style_guide
mcp_tools.description: Access to organizational style guide rules, terminology databases, and formatting standards. Ensures documents conform to established conventions.

capabilities.terminology_database: Map of preferred terms and their deprecated alternatives
capabilities.style_rules: Active voice, concision, audience-appropriate complexity, citation format
capabilities.brand_guidelines: Naming conventions, product references, legal disclaimers

mcp_tools.name: export_render
mcp_tools.description: Converts Markdown documents to PDF and DOCX formats. Applies organizational styling, page layout, headers/footers, and table of contents generation.

mcp_tools.name: playwright_browser
mcp_tools.description: Fallback PDF rendering tool. Used only when the primary export_render tool fails. Renders the Markdown as HTML in a headless browser and captures as PDF.

internal_tools.name: write_section
internal_tools.description: Write a single section of the document based on the plan outline and evidence. Handles evidence lookup, content generation, citation insertion, and word count tracking.

section_id.description: Section ID from the documentation plan.

section_plan.description: The section definition from the plan including title, purpose, key_points, evidence_refs.

style_context.description: Style guide overrides for this section.

internal_tools.name: assemble_document
internal_tools.description: Combine front matter and all written sections into a single Markdown document. Validates structure, generates table of contents if needed, and ensures consistent formatting.

internal_tools.name: render_export
internal_tools.description: Render the assembled Markdown document into the requested export formats (PDF, DOCX). Orchestrates the export_render MCP tool and falls back to playwright_browser for PDF if needed.

style_preset.description: Which styling preset to apply to exports.
